mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, order_no, related_user_id, remark, create_time FROM biz_wallet_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, order_no, related_user_id, remark, create_time FROM biz_wallet_transaction WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC
